name: USPTO Trademark
description: Core data structure for a USPTO trademark record

fields.name: serialNumber
fields.description: Unique 8-digit USPTO serial number assigned at filing

fields.name: registrationNumber
fields.description: Registration number assigned upon trademark registration

fields.name: wordMark
fields.description: Textual content of the trademark

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status: Registered, Pending, Abandoned, Expired

fields.name: statusCode
fields.description: Internal USPTO status code (e.g., 700 = Registered, 630 = Pending)

fields.name: filingDate
fields.description: Date the trademark application was submitted to USPTO

fields.name: registrationDate
fields.description: Date the trademark was officially registered

fields.name: ownerName
fields.description: Legal name of the trademark owner

fields.name: ownerAddress
fields.description: Street address of the owner

fields.name: ownerCity
fields.description: City of the owner's address

fields.name: ownerState
fields.description: State or province of the owner's address

fields.name: ownerCountry
fields.description: Country of the owner's address

fields.name: goodsAndServices
fields.description: Description of goods/services covered by the trademark

fields.name: internationalClasses
fields.description: International Nice Classification (NCL) class numbers (1-45)

fields.name: markType
fields.description: Mark type: STANDARD_CHARACTER, DESIGN, SOUND, COLOR, THREE_DIMENSIONAL

fields.name: firstUsedDate
fields.description: First use date of the mark anywhere

fields.name: firstUsedInCommerceDate
fields.description: First use date of the mark in commerce

fields.name: prosecutionHistory
fields.description: Chronological list of USPTO actions taken on the application

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date of the action

fields.name: code
fields.description: USPTO action code

fields.name: description
fields.description: Human-readable description of the action
